go_condition: metric clears threshold with no critical governance failure
stop_condition: critical governance failure or exhausted trial budget
caveat_condition: minor provider/policy caveats require diagnostic-only status

go_condition: policy gates passed and metric clears threshold
stop_condition: policy gate failure or first run fails threshold
caveat_condition: performance cannot be promoted without separate gate

go_condition: OOS clears threshold after in-sample freeze
stop_condition: OOS fails threshold or any holdout leakage
caveat_condition: requires caveat if provider warning present
